name: Strawberry Pretzel Surprise
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the broken pretzels, 1 tablespoon sugar, and margarine. Pat into a 9x13 inch baking dish.
2. Bake at 400 degrees for 6 minutes. Set aside to cool.
3. In a separate bowl, cream together the cream cheese and 1 cup of sugar.
4. Fold in the Cool Whip until combined.
5. Spread the cooled cream cheese mixture over the chilled pretzel layer.
6. Dissolve the strawberry jello in hot pineapple juice. Stir in the frozen strawberries until combined.
7. When the jello has slightly thickened, spoon it over the cream cheese layer.
8. Chill the dish until serving.
